executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The only true HTTP API route is POST /api/webhooks/midtrans. All other endpoints are Next.js Server Actions not accessible as regular REST APIs. The Midtrans webhook requires SHA512 signature verification: SHA512(order_id + status_code + gross_amount + MIDTRANS_SERVER_KEY). The server key is not available for testing, so the signature test will likely return 401. Focus testing on the webhook endpoint structure and response format.
